report_name: Sanctioned Crypto Exchange Grinex Halts Operations After $13.74M Hack

threat_actors.name: Unattributed Grinex Attacker
threat_actors.description: The unknown entity responsible for the hack of the Grinex and TokenSpot cryptocurrency exchanges, stealing over $13.74 million by compromising hot wallet private keys and laundering the funds.
threat_actors.goals: Theft of cryptocurrency funds for financial profit.

attack_patterns.name: Private Keys
attack_patterns.description: The core of the attack was the theft of private keys controlling the Grinex exchange's hot wallets, which enabled the unauthorized fund transfers.

attack_patterns.name: Financial Theft
attack_patterns.description: Attackers used stolen private keys to sign and broadcast transactions, transferring over $13.74 million in cryptocurrency from Grinex's wallets to wallets under their control.

attack_patterns.name: Obfuscated Files or Information
attack_patterns.description: Attackers immediately laundered the stolen funds by swapping Tether (USDT) for non-freezable assets like ETH and TRX on various decentralized exchanges to obscure the trail and evade asset freezing by Tether Inc.

identities.name: Grinex
identities.description: A Kyrgyzstan-based cryptocurrency exchange sanctioned by the U.S. and U.K. that was the primary victim of a hack resulting in the theft of $13.74 million and its subsequent shutdown.

identities.name: TokenSpot
identities.description: A related cryptocurrency exchange that was impacted by a smaller, simultaneous attack, with funds funneled to the same consolidation addresses as the Grinex hack.

infrastructure.name: Attacker Cryptocurrency Laundering Wallets
infrastructure.description: Approximately 70 cryptocurrency addresses were used by the attackers to receive and launder the stolen funds from the Grinex and TokenSpot exchanges.

infrastructure.name: Decentralized Exchanges (DEXs)
infrastructure.description: Used by the attackers to rapidly swap stolen Tether (USDT) for non-freezable assets like ETH and TRX to launder the funds and evade freezing.
